summary: Amid the bloopers on the 1994 NBC "Socks" ID, logos invade - and so do two members of the Evil Twin Alliance, seeking revenge for Electra Shocker's demise. [NOTE: A new voice for Angel Pamela (Mary in Hall Rate 160 P125) and Helena's voice is lower pitched.]

summary: Have your priorities changed? Funny Signs can help.

summary: Madson-Lane style randomness once again. Ejections: 2 Rebound: 2

summary: Stupidity is not a handicap, only failure to enjoy funny signs is.

summary: We're only human, so we can read funny signs.

title: davemadson Shorts 39: In the Aftermath of Pamela's Passing
summary: At Pamela's memorial service, friends reminisce; In Hades Palace, Satan laments losing Electra and his minions devise a plan to get even; and in God's Country, Pamela becomes an angel.

title: davemadson's PBS Bloopers 73: Deadly Games
summary: In this PBS blooper session, the studio is under attack! The gang bravely fends it off, but afterwards a sad announcement is made.

title: Madson Lane Vol. 12
summary: . I. RETURN OF THE BOOMERANG EFFECT - The boomerang effect hits again, and it's Rowena's turn to try to fix it. II. WISHY-WASHY WESTINGHOUSE - This time it's the Westinghouse ad tag from the mid-1960s that tries to remember who it's working for. III. WHAT THE HELL? - Hellish hijinks ensue when Dave gets trapped and Vulcie must rescue him. IV. A RUSH AND A FLASH - Mary experiences a coffee rush and Beulah and Abby demonstrate their flashing abilities.

title: davemadson's Blooper Salad 8: The ABC's of V
summary: The 1999 ABC Dots ID and Viacom V of Doom ID are the main ingredients in this blooper salad, spiced up with a relapse from Sam, randomness and a run-in with two evil twins.

summary: On a hot day, the gang takes in bloopers on the 2011 NBC ID, with some randomness and intruders thrown in.

title: davemadson Shorts 38: Renewing Our Pledges Of Love
summary: Upon hearing of pending legislation that could annul their marriages, the couples - Dave and Rhonda, Sam and Anna, Mike and Mary, and Guy and Katelyn - decide to renew their marriage vows, but face a hurdle.

summary: Welcome to the jungle - the jungle of logos gone wrong, followed by the correct logos. Once again, you have been warned.

summary: Stupidity never runs low, so here comes another parade of logos gone wrong, followed by the correct logos. You have been warned.

summary: The gang negotiates its way through V of Doom bloopers and intrusions by the Hikon FIlms Eye of Doom and two evil beings. Launches: 1

summary: Just when you thought it was safe to watch videos, here comes another parade of logos gone wrong. You have been warned.

summary: Ingredients: the Fremantle ID and NET Globe ID. Also included: randomness and a threat from two intruders.

summary: Here we go again - another parade of logos gone wrong, followed by the correct logos. Once again, you have been warned.

summary: The SG bloopers roll on, Dave has Lucretia's venom removed, and Tawny shows up to protest.

title: davemadson's NBC Bloopers 28: Sock It To Blooper
summary: {Headphone user warning at 11:09] More bloopers on the NBC "Socks" ID, Scotty relinquishes directing duties to Sam, who suffers a relapse into his bossy ways, and evil intruders stir up more trouble. New versions of my channel intro and outro appear for the first time here.

title: davemadson's SEGA Bloopers 6: Super Sonic Bloopers
summary: The gang celebrates Sonic the Hedgehog's 35th anniversary with SEGA logo bloopers, but also has run-ins with two evil logos and the notorious Lulu Thorn.

summary: New video from Dave Madson Entertainment Inc.

summary: Here we go. More logos gone wrong and you have been warned. [Made from an earlier remaster due to inability to find original]

summary: The ingredients: the 2013 Universal TV ID and 1998 PBS "People's" ID. Randomness, more developing romantic interests and a run-in with diabolical intruders spice things up.

title: davemadson Classics: SGSFH Bloopers 9: Logo Justice
summary: Logos invade the SGSFH turf, and so do the Red NYET, Angry P-Head and Two-Headed P-Head.

summary: There are bloopers in the Naked S, and logos, the Red NYET, those infernal imps and a zombie invade. [CAUTION: a gross act occurs at 8:30]

title: davemadson Update 5-30-2026
summary: In this update, Dave and Taylor announce DME's summer video plans, and Lulu shows up to protest.

title: davemadson's PBS Bloopers 70: Playtime Before Summer
summary: With summer approaching, the gang has a lot of fun with PBS bloopers, but also has run-ins with the Angry P-Head, Two-Headed P-Head and Evil Mary.

title: davemadson's CBS Bloopers 27: In the Eye of the Storm
summary: In this CBS Blooper session, a settlement is reached in the Hades Palace appeal of the Evil Beings' ban on Earthly appearances, Officer Pamela suffers another relapse, and the McEvils stir up trouble.

title: davemadson's NBC Bloopers 27: Knock Your Socks Off
summary: As the Stokers settle in, the gang does bloopers on the NBC "Socks" ID and deals with intruders.

title: davemadson Shorts 36: After the Reform
summary: In the aftermath of the fall of Stoker-Thorn Trouble Inc., Lulu and Tawny join the Evil Beings and Drew becomes their lawyer. Dave shows the Stokers around the davemadson building and Martina teaches them, and the Ash Sisters, to fly.

title: davemadson's PBS Bloopers 69: A Showdown With Troublemakers
summary: The gang does bloopers on the 1993 P-Pals ID, and the Stokers and Thorns show up once more, but a big surprise is on the horizon.

title: davemadson's NBC Bloopers 26: Birds of a Blooper
summary: Unexpected twists and turns, and another clash with troublemakers, punctuate this NBC Bloopers session. Thanks to Stella Momoboshi (SakuraStar9402) for the yellow stage scene.

title: davemadson's NET Bloopers 20: Household Madness
summary: Length 11 nin 20 sec The madness runs rampant as the gang plays house with the NET bloopers.

title: davemadson Shorts 35: Are Two Sams Better Than One?
summary: Sam and Sam X, along with Dave and Rhonda, dine out at Chez Monyou, but the Sams go overboard with tacos (and the bill!)

title: davemadson's SG Bloopers 42: Kicking S
summary: In this wild and crazy SG Blooper session, the Fourth Wall House explodes again, two troublemakers create chaos, and Pamela suffers a relapse.

title: davemadson's NBC Bloopers 25: Letters and Troublemakers
summary: Back to the Light-Up Letters for this NBC Blooper session, featuring randomness and another visit by troublemakers.

title: davemadson's Viacom Logo Bloopers 5: Pinball Wizards
summary: Bloopers on the 1971 Viacom Pinball ID. Tyler has a new look, and Bandita Stoker and Lulu Thorn stir up more trouble.

title: Madson Lane Vol. 11
summary: I. RUNAWAY V OF DOOM - In the spirit of Fugitive Television, the V of Doom escapes and invades other logo IDs. II. FUN WITH PORTALS - Scotty finds a device that creates portals. III. MEDICAL MALICE - Sam sees a doctor about his aches and pains. IV. TILT-A-WHIRL - Logos (and the studio) tilt, then turn upside down. Ejections: 1

title: davemadson's PBS Bloopers 68: I've Seen That Blooper Before
summary: The gang retraces old roads in this PBS Blooper session, with more randomness. Helena Stoker and Electra Shocker of Stoker-Thorn Trouble Inc. show up for more trouble.

title: davemadson's NBC Bloopers 24: In Living Blooper
summary: This time it's the 2011 NBC ID that gets the blooper treatment. Scotty and Guy revert to their original look, C.J. O'Randolph is promoted to captain, and logos and troublemakers invade. Thanks to BigIdeaFan for the new Donkey Kong bit.

title: davemadson's Funny Signs and Errors: Smoking Bare Feet Pets
summary: Even if you don't smoke, walk barefoot or have pets, you can still enjoy this wild, crazy and random-as-f*** funny sign and error session.

title: davemadson's Blooper Salad 5: Crowning Ranks
summary: The 1975 Rankin-Bass ID and the King Features Dancing Crown are the ingredients of this blooper salad, with some ramdomness mixed in and another invasion by troublemakers.

title: davemadson's LT Bloopers 286: Classic Blooper Boogaloo
summary: The 18th LT Bloopers season kicks off with a plethora of nostalgic trips.

title: davemadson's PBS Bloopers 67: The Trouble With Logos
summary: Bloopers on the 1989 PBS ID, logos invade and so do the Stoker sisters. The GM Squad is renamed Stoker-Thorn Trouble Inc.

title: davemadson's SG Bloopers 41: Return of the GM Squad
summary: In this round of SG Bloopers, randomness abounds and the GM Squad returns, seeking to avenge the freezing of Hades Palace.

title: davemadson's Rankin-Bass Bloopers 6: High-Rankin Bloopers
summary: The 1975 RB ID is the subject of this blooper session, and all six RoboSofts appear on screen for the first time in a davemadson video. Ejections: 2

title: davemadson's CBS Bloopers 26: Eyewitness Bloopers
summary: The gang tries to riff through the CBS Color ID Bloopers, but a wildfire engulfs New ROFL City and the Evil Beings stir up trouble once again.

title: davemadson's Blooper Salad 4: A Blooperful Anniversary
summary: It's an all-star celebration of my channel's 15th anniversary, with a super-sized blooper salad, reminiscences of past videos and another miracle happening in the studio.

title: davemadson's PBS Bloopers 66: Blame It On the Blooper
summary: As the PBS Blooper parade continues, craziness and randomness abounds and evil entities protesting their ban on entering Earth perform an abduction!

title: davemadson Update 4-1-2026
summary: In this update, Scotty and Guy sport new looks, Harry's now Danny Donaldson, and Evil Mary poses a threat.

title: davemadson's Funny Signs and Errors: Got Crabs?
summary: Daniel (BigIdeaFan) joins the cast for this insanely wacky funny sign and error session.

title: davemadson's LT Bloopers 285: A World of Bloopers
summary: In the 17th season finale of LT Bloopers, Tio joins up, more randomness abounds and there's a run-in with evil logo parodies. This is also the last appearance of Daiki and Gabbie in a davemadson video for a while as Fargusno recently left the davemadson community. And since Matt Crowley has also left the davemadson community, TheXavier456 now plays Jesus.

title: davemadson's Blooper Salad 3: Sunburst in the House
summary: The 1960s Westinghouse tag and the 1976-82 CPT Sunburst ID are the ingredients in this blooper salad. However, Helena and Bandita crash the feast with a not-so-very-appetizing dressing.

title: Welcome to Dave City
summary: Welcome to Dave City, the new community site for Dave Madson Entertainment Inc. Here you will find the latest videos, community resources, and open source projects.

title: davemadson's NET Bloopers 19: If Globes Came In Bottles
summary: The gang attempts to get the NET Globe ID right, but Lucretia, Rowena and Sylvia show up, threatening the Ash Family and seeking to avenge the carpet shampooer treatment Punxsutawney Hauldren gave the Stalker Guy and Electra Shocker.

title: davemadson's SEGA Bloopers 5: Stalking Up On Business
summary: In the wildest and craziest SEGA Blooper session to date, a stalker shows up looking for Punxsutawney Hauldren.

title: davemadson's SG Bloopers 40: Logo Jumbo
summary: Various logos invade the SG turf, Sam gets spooked by a scary logo and randomness abounds.

title: davemadson's PBS Bloopers 65: Public Birthing Service
summary: The gang rummages through a series of 1971 PBS ID bloopers, has random moments and a run-in with the McEvils, while Katelyn gives birth to twins.

title: davemadson's Viacom Logo Bloopers 4: Revenge of the V
summary: Amid the V of Doom bloopers, there is more randomness, a commercial plug, and a revenge plot. Mitch sports a retro look.

title: davemadson's NBC Bloopers 23: The Peacock's Centennial Jubilee: An NBC100 Logo Bloopers Special
summary: The gang celebrates NBC's 100th anniversary with a smattering of NBC ID Bloopers and Matt is revived. So is Matt's evil twin, who, along with Sylvia, Medusa and members of the Scary Logo Alliance, crashes the party.

title: davemadson Shorts 34: Reformed and Renovated
summary: The davemadson studio has a new look and Magmarina and Frederick quit Hades Palace and join up with Dave and friends, but Lucretia seeks to avenge their defection.

title: davemadson Shorts 33: Randomness City IX
summary: Another spate of randomness a la Madson Lane, featuring more background issues and duplicates of characters.

title: davemadson's LT Bloopers 284: Bloopers Held Hostage (Part 2)
summary: Will Sam and Anna recover and return to the studio, or will the Evil Beings possess them? This episode will tell. Judge M.L. Fairly comes out of retirement.

title: davemadson Shorts 32: The Ash Sisters Get Reformed
summary: The Ash Sisters, fired from Hades Palace, join up at davemadson entertainment inc., but Rowena nearly spoils the party.

title: davemadson's LT Bloopers 283: Bloopers Held Hostage (Part 1)
summary: In this LT Blooper session, Sam freaks out to the point of taking Scotty hostage, Bubblegum's evil twin shows up, and a ransom note triggers a tantrum with a shocking result.

title: davemadson's NBC Bloopers 22: Snakes and Stones
summary: Bloopers on the NBC Snake ID and run-ins with Rowena, Sylvia and Medusa.

title: davemadson's CBS Bloopers 25: Eyes on the Prize
summary: Amid the bloopers on the 1992 CBS ID, the gang encounters a scary logo and some troublemakers, and a surprise about the child Guy and Katelyn are expecting.

title: davemadson's LT Bloopers 282: Wild Shield Chase
summary: This LT blooper session includes a chase reminiscent of "Fugitive Television" and another run-in with evil beings, one of whom is a brother of the Ash Sisters. The Angelic Society appears in full force.
